series_metadata.series_description: A form that is used to deposit, retrieve, return, and destroy records stored off-site.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain information regarding off site storage electronically until records are no longer stored at an off-site location. Then store electronic copy of certification of disposal (see OCC-RR-04). ; Paper: Retain in records electronically until records are no longer stored at an off-site location. Then store electronic copy of certification of disposal (see OCC-RR-04)., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Recycle
